sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.content:
This proposal outlines a comprehensive approach to building an AI-powered operations platform that will transform your drive-through operations with real-time computer vision and predictive ordering.

The system will deliver:
- **Sub-300ms** end-to-end processing latency
- **+15%** revenue uplift per location
- **99.9%** system uptime with edge-first architecture

sections.title: Scope of Work
sections.content:
### Phase 1: Discovery & Architecture (Weeks 1-2)
- Technical audit of existing infrastructure
- Requirements gathering with operations team
- Architecture design document and review

### Phase 2: Core Platform Build (Weeks 3-8)
- Edge inference pipeline on NVIDIA Jetson
- Vehicle detection and license plate recognition
- Customer lookup and prediction engine
- POS system integration

### Phase 3: Testing & Deployment (Weeks 9-12)
- Load testing and performance optimization
- Pilot deployment at first location
- Staff training and documentation
- Performance monitoring dashboard

sections.title: Approach
sections.content:
We follow an **edge-first architecture** — all critical processing happens locally on-site, eliminating cloud dependency and ensuring sub-300ms response times.

Key technical decisions:
1. **NVIDIA Jetson Orin** for edge inference
2. **Private LTE (CBRS)** for reliable site-wide connectivity
3. **Event-driven architecture** for real-time data flow
4. **Containerized deployment** for reproducible rollouts

sections.title: Timeline
sections.content:
| Phase | Duration | Deliverables |
|-------|----------|--------------|
| Discovery | 2 weeks | Architecture doc, requirements |
| Build | 6 weeks | Core platform, integrations |
| Deploy | 4 weeks | Pilot site, monitoring, training |
| **Total** | **12 weeks** | **Production system** |

sections.title: Investment
sections.content:
### Engagement Options

**Option A: Full Build**
End-to-end platform development, deployment, and 3 months of support.

**Option B: Architecture + Advisory**
Architecture design, vendor selection guidance, and team enablement.

*Detailed pricing available upon request. All engagements include a 2-week discovery phase before commitment.*

sections.title: Terms
sections.content:
- **Payment:** 30% upfront, 40% at midpoint, 30% on delivery
- **IP:** Client owns all deliverables and source code
- **Confidentiality:** Mutual NDA in effect
- **Support:** 90 days post-launch support included
- **Cancellation:** Either party may terminate with 14 days written notice

sections.title: About Jonathan Lyn-Shue
sections.content:
Jonathan is a technology leader with 10+ years building data products, AI systems, and engineering teams. He serves as CIO at Anuba Technologies (edge AI for QSR) and as a senior consultant at a Fortune 100 agency.

**Areas of expertise:**
- Edge AI & computer vision systems
- Engineering governance & IT strategy
- Full-stack development & data pipelines
- MCP protocol integrations

**Contact:** jon@jonathanlynshue.com
